evidence.velocity_vs_rigour: Produce ad hoc reports and data extracts for business, audit, and compliance; data quality, governance, data lineage
evidence.velocity_vs_rigour_explanation: Classified as rigour because responsibilities explicitly reference audit, compliance, data quality validation, data governance, and data lineage — with no velocity or speed-to-ship signals.
evidence.domain_risk: Government Administration industry; audit, and compliance explicitly named in responsibilities
evidence.domain_risk_explanation: Classified as high because the role is in Government Administration and explicitly names 'audit, and compliance' as a reporting category, placing errors in the regulatory/public-sector exposure zone.
evidence.data_team_maturity: modern enterprise data platform using Microsoft Fabric; 8+ years required; enterprise scale
evidence.data_team_maturity_explanation: Classified as mature because the role targets an enterprise data platform with 8+ years of experience required, Microsoft Fabric at scale, and a formal government client context.
evidence.jd_authorship: Perform data migration, validation, reconciliation, and quality analysis; Create data mappings, transformation rules, Data Management Plans
evidence.jd_authorship_explanation: Classified as mixed because specific technical deliverables (data mappings, transformation rules, Data Management Plans) sit alongside generic collaboration bullets ('deliver scalable, high-quality data solutions').
evidence.stakeholder_orientation: business, audit, and compliance; data governance and data integration initiatives; business and technical teams
evidence.stakeholder_orientation_explanation: Classified as mixed because the role spans audit/compliance reporting (finance/governance), internal data platform work, and business team collaboration with genuinely equal weight.
evidence.autonomy_level: Support data governance; support delivery of a modern enterprise data platform
evidence.autonomy_level_explanation: Classified as execution because 'support data governance' and 'support delivery' signal the candidate executes against a defined architecture, not sets direction — reinforced by contract framing.
evidence.ai_role_explanation: No AI tool usage or AI infrastructure enablement is mentioned anywhere in the JD.
evidence.testing_framing: Perform data migration, validation, reconciliation, and quality analysis
evidence.testing_framing_explanation: Classified as responsibility because 'perform data migration, validation, reconciliation, and quality analysis' frames data quality validation as a primary owned responsibility of the candidate.
evidence.loss_aversion_framing: audit, and compliance; data quality issues; data quality, governance
evidence.loss_aversion_framing_explanation: Classified as high because 'audit, and compliance' is explicitly named as a report output category and 'data quality, governance' dominates the responsibility list — trustworthiness and regulatory exposure are primary framings.
evidence.greenfield_vs_fix: support delivery of a modern enterprise data platform
evidence.greenfield_vs_fix_explanation: Classified as mixed because the role involves both supporting delivery of a new Microsoft Fabric platform (greenfield) and performing data migration/validation from existing systems (fix_scale).
evidence.loss_aversion: audit, and compliance; data quality, governance — compliance and audit reporting are primary outputs, indicating high concern for data trust and regulatory exposure.
